autumn_leaves.form_sanity_note: n_blocks=41 (~328 bars @ grain=8). Canonical AABC form = 4 sections x 8 bars = 32 bars/chorus. 328/32 = 10.25 chorus repeats -- a long recording (known 330-bar/422s duration mismatch, extended solo/vamp) reusing a SMALL section vocabulary many times, consistent with k<=5 being the musically correct target, not a forced constraint.

abba_chiquitita_official_lyric_video.form_sanity_note: n_blocks=29 (~232 bars). Pop verse/chorus/bridge/intro/outro vocabulary is canonically <=5 distinct section types even with many repeats.

aretha_franklin_chain_of_fools_official_.form_sanity_note: n_blocks=10 (~80 bars), shortest of the 3. Soul vamp-based song -- often even fewer distinct sections (single groove + bridge); a degenerate single-cluster collapse is a real risk here given this project's documented aretha over-merge history, checked explicitly below.
